title: stone armor
description: replaces chainmail armor with stone armor with a brand new crafting recipe
body:
this datapack/mod tries to recreate stone armor in vanilla by adding a crafting recipe to chainmail with stone


# why would I want to install this? 
if you want to get armor in the early game then you should use this datapack because it replaces chainmail with stone armor which has the exact same stats, and it could be a good replacement for iron

it is recommended to use the datapack version
